obligations.obligation: (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette.
obligations.short_summary: Regulations become enforceable upon publication in the Official Gazette.

obligations.obligation:
In the Central Electricity Authority (Installation and Operation of Meters) Regulations, 2006 (herein after
referred to as the said regulations), in sub-regulation (1) of regulation 4, for clause (b) the following shall be
substituted, namely:-
“(b) All consumers in areas with communication network,...
obligations.risk_level: Medium to High depending on implementation timelines and infrastructure readiness
obligations.due_date: within timelines as provided by Central Government or within X days/months of regulation amendment date (N/A)
obligations.affected_entity: All consumers in areas with communication network and State Electricity Commissions for prepayment meters
obligations.short_summary: Substitution of clause (b) mandates installation or upgrade to Smart Meters in areas with communication networks, while allowing State Electricity Commissions discretion for prepayment meters without such network.

obligations.obligation:
Provided also that all the Advanced Metering Infrastructure shall include the prepayment
functionality and shall be interoperable in accordance with the guidelines issued by the Authority:
Provided also that the Smart Meter conforming to relevant Indian Standard with accuracy class
of 1.0/0.5S shall...
obligations.affected_entity: Smart Meters conforming to Indian Standard with accuracy class of 1.0/0.5S
obligations.short_summary: Mandate for prepayment functionality and interoperability in Smart Meter systems.

PUBLIC NOTICE
In exercise of powers conferred under Section 177 of the
Electricity Act, 2003, the Central Electricity Authority (CEA),
proposes to notify the draft Central Electricity Authority
(Installation and Operation of Meters) Amendment
Regulations, 2026. The proposed draft regulations are available
on the CEA Website www.cea.nic.in for inviting public
comments.
2. All the Stakeholders and the public are requested to send
their comments on the draft regulations to Chief Engineer
(Legal), Sewa Bhawan (North Wing), Room No. 622, 6th Floor,
